hello morimens server. i would like to humbly ask for recommended d-tide team comps. i would like to get at least 350 points (maybe 400, but i don't know if i'm that skilled yet) but am not entirely sure where to start with said team comps or what counts as a "good" team comp. i have included all of the awakeners i currently possess
Trying to build a team around my E3 Kath would love some advice
hihi c: u still looking to teambuild?
nice supports for kath: horla, thais, clem, tinct, gramona, karen
Awesome! Thank you so much for help
c: also, do you know what wheels and covenant to equip her?
I don't have her wheel so I am planning on using the Titan.  As for coves I've heard Paradox and Feast but I could be wrong
yus! i find feast (full cr) easier to play around, and for the other wheel, land of non existence SR. This is a tank kathi
Alright. I look into feast then for her coves. Ty :3
so.. im not a pro building teams,  but you can probably split the twin divas c:

so the plan is:

- wave 3: borrow a kath and fill with tinct and other awakeners that are not super leveled up.
- wave 4: castor delay team: castor + jenkins + winkle  + flex (prob ogier)
- wave 5: pollux + thais + aigis + flex 
- wave 2: mou mou karen helot and faint
- wave 1: tawil + ramona + caecus + flex
should i do these a5 or a3? also, thank you! (i assume the "flex" is any awakener that i feel like filling the team with?)
i wouldnt do a5 straight out of the bat
i dont know what you tipically go for
but i like to do a3 everything to see the map layout and mechanics
that makes sense! i'll do that, then! thank you so much for the help
happy to be of help, let me know how you do c:
(also, you know about w3 blesser right?)
it hits bigger the less shields you have
and there is a turn where he spawns a single enemy in front of him, if you kill that enemy when he has any attack intention, then he doubles the number of hits he does
so the strategy is to shield a lot to make his attack small, and burst when he has dormancy intention
i won't start my d-tide attempts until after i've slept, i want to be at my most energized to work through these

you auto when you are winning by an absurd marging

casiah can run other stuff like crimson pulse which is probably better

and also get everyone to skill level 3 on everything

it used to be called skey
as for the free limited, depends on if you want immediate presence or long term value
for immediate effect, castor is your best pick
he is a top tier unit even at e0, giving you alot of shield and extra damage
for future investmen, kathigura is arguable the best pick there
she need her E3, but once she get it, she becomes a monster of dps/shielder

I have full set of scarlet embrace, crimsion pulse and steppenwolf
have u tried celestial beast on gelot
e3 beast is prolly around same strength as e0 gelot wheel

get castor wheel (unbearable freedom) from selector

Hand size = good
save the standard selectors until you know what you want
the wheels can just all be dumped into blade of the titan if you arent sure
just pull for the wheel you want later if you change your mind

put support covenants on your supports

dps covenants on your dps

crimson pulse on aequor for crits

steppenwolf on nobody because you shouldnt be playing flat counter or poison
how to tell if a covenant is support or dps: if its a crit multiplier its dps
if it doesnt add a damage/crit multiplier of some kind its support
exception is dreams of medicine which is less of a support/dps and more of a "i want to keep playing this character's cards and none of the other characters' cards"
in fact covenants are highly comp dependent and u shouldnt be asking me vague questions without posting your team <:fail:1356083552923422770>
Sorry, mb, uh my first team is - kath, ramona, thais and helot. Second team is - mouchette, aigis, helot, thais

1st team: kath can be on feast from afar (more defense) or paradox (damage). Ramona is keyflare bot so life drain. Others can hold whatever support cov

2nd team: dreams of medicine for mouchette (crimson pulse or scarlet embrace is ok if you cant buy it yet). Aigis is keyflare bot and holds life drain. Again, thais and helot flex
flex can be for example re-evolution, deus ex machina

but its kinda a late game money sink
just try to get decent main stats for now

She'd do just fine, but you'll ideally want to have her OE so that she can reduce the Cost of Mouchette's Shining Tornados to 0 that you have placed into the Ultra Space for your Ultra Turn
Reducing Cost by 1 works just fine

Mb double clicked the lol emote

Yeah, she'll be coming in like 10 Days
Can get a Copy of Tulu while you're at it if you'd like in preparation for Arc 2 Content
Doesn't gmurphy get an additional 50 dmg amp for pure blue/chaos teams?

Yes, but for Arc 1 Content and going forwards you'll want to have somebody who can apply Vulnerable for Burst / Kill Turns & Weakness to lower the Damage that you'll take from Enemies / prevent them from killing you entirely
Ah got it, is pure blue my end goal tho? You explicitly said arc 1
Also, Thais allows you to get a Dupe of GMurphy's Waltz Card for more Damage
Yeah, GMurphy's Ideal Comp for Arc 2 Content consists solely of Lemurian Units
Lemurian Units just happen to all be Aequor / Blue Units

On a different note, due to an Anni event, I'm soon able to choose an arc2 limited, which one should I pick?
Castor & Clementine are generally the "safe" picks that you can choose from, as they are both immediately serviceable at E0 with every following Enlightenment massively improving their Effectiveness
Literally just blue standards, Thais, gmurphy, and some other standards from off banner pulls
Yeah but that'd mean I'd have to start from zero with ultra

I'd say that you should go for Castor then, as he can run a Team of his own just fine consisting of Standard Ultra / Purple Awakeners such as Jenkins & Winkle with the Final Slot generally be reserved for somebody that can apply Vulnerable to Enemies
Sounds good, thank you very much for your help <:pray:1356053116260454534>
Damn okay was actually kinda hoping to just expand with Caro since I already got thais

You could, but the thing is Doresain is not recommended as he generally wants Enlightenments to be effectiveness but his DPS falls short of Standard Awakeners that you'll easily be able to obtain anyways. Pickman on the other hand is a Support like Thais who you can fit into any Comp, so he effectively cannot be used a DPS unless you're running with High Investment with other Premium Supports

But if you want to, GDoll can be used at E1 or without any Enlightenments at all

They are both Units who has released during Arc 2, much like with every other Unit you can select from the Anniversary Posse Event

Since we've already come this far, what about getting Kath then?
Go for it, she can be a good long term investment funneling Proto Horizons until she reached her ideal Enlightenment Level of E3
And once you do get her, you can run her in virtually any Comp you want and still perform well
Though, her ideal Realms are Mono Chaos or Ultra Chaos
As that's where her best Supports are
